The '''Corellian Home Fleet''', also known as the '''Corellian defense fleet''', was the space [[Navy/Legends|navy]] that defended [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. It was the most important fleet of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].

==Organization==
The Corellian defense fleet was one of the major fleets of the [[Corellian Defense Forces Space Service|Space Service]] of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] (CDF). It was assigned to the defense of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="Betrayal" /> Its headquarters were located in the [[Orbital Industrial Zone]] of Corellia.<ref name="SoF" />

The Corellian Home Fleet, along with the rest of the CDF, was led by the ruler of the Corellian system, namely the [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]],<ref name="AaC" /> later replaced by the [[Five World Prime Minister]].<ref name="Betrayal" /> Within the military, the CDF and the Corellian Home Fleet were commanded by the [[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force]].<ref name="Exile" />

===Starships===
{{Quote|They have nothing in the size class of Dodonna, but they have Strident-class Star Defenders and a large number of frigates, corvettes, patrol boats, gunships, and heavy transports. Mostly Corellian Engineering Corporation, of course.|A [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] [[Sensor officer/Legends|sensor officer]]|<ref name="Betrayal" />}}
The Corellian Home Fleet used various types of [[Starship/Legends|starships]], mostly manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="Betrayal" /> The capital ships included [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (such as the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]<ref name="TCSWE-Silaban">{{CSWECite|III|151|''Silaban''}}</ref> and the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette]]<ref name="SoF" />), [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]], [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]],<ref name="Betrayal" /> [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]],<ref name="Bloodlines" /> and [[Star Defender]]s (such as the [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class Star Defender]]).<ref name="Betrayal" /> Smaller vessels encompassed [[Patrol ship/Legends|patrol boats]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (such as the [[Pocket Patrol Boat]]<ref name="AaC" />), [[Transport/Legends|transports]], and [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]] (such as the [[Starfighter/Legends|Corellian attack fighter]]).<ref name="Betrayal" />

In addition, the Corellian defense fleet used ancient models of Imperial starships decades after the end of the Galactic Civil War such as [[TIE series/Legends|TIE series fighters]], [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]s, [[A-10 interceptor]]s, [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s and [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

==History==
Near the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] gained control of the Corellian system after the fall of the Diktat's regime. [[Micamberlecto]], the newly-appointed New Republic [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], became the new commander-in-chief of the Corellian Armed Forces. However, Corellian troops, in particular Imperial and Diktat loyalists, were reluctant to obey to a New Republic appointee.<ref name="AaC" /> At the beginning of the [[Corellian Crisis]], in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the majority of the CDF space forces betrayed the New Republic and defected to the [[Sacorrian Triad|Triad]] of [[Sacorria]].<ref name="SaC">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref> Later, during the takeover of Corellia by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s [[Human League]], the few remaining Corellian space forces in the Corellian system joined Thrackan Sal-Solo.<ref name="AaC" /> Elements of the Corellian defense fleet attempted to capture New Republic [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].<ref name="AaS" />

More than a decade later, years after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Corellian system was governed by the regime of the [[Five Worlds]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the tensions between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the Five Worlds resulted in the outbreak of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The conflict erupted when the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] invaded the Corellian system during [[Operation Roundabout]]. At that time, the Corellian Home Fleet contained at least a dozen starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] and hundreds of capital ships (although none of them were the size of the [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carrier]]). However, many of the ships were little more than wrecks designed to intimidate and confuse, distracting from the truly operational ships. During Operation Roundabout, the Corellian defense fleet clashed against the superior space forces of the Galactic Alliance and suffered heavy casualties. Nevertheless, Corellian defense forces resisted and prevented the Galactic Alliance to take over Corellia.<ref name="Betrayal" /> The unsuccessful Galactic Alliance Navy eventually [[Blockade of Corellia|blockaded]] Corellia in retaliation.<ref name="Bloodlines" /> During the Blockade, Corellian Home Fleet was engaged in hit-and-run attacks on Galactic Alliance ships across the five planets of the Corellian system.<ref name="Tempest" /> Some time later, the conflict escalated and other worlds joined Corellia in the war, forming the [[Confederation]]. Confederation space forces [[Battle of Corellia (Second Galactic Civil War)|attacked]] the Galactic Alliance navy in the Corellian system and assisted the Corellian Home Fleet in breaking the blockade of Corellia.<ref name="Exile" />
